title: Python Developer
description:
Job Description:

  • Design and develop reusable agentic AI workflows with LangGraph and LLMs.
  • Craft and refine clear, effective prompts for diverse tasks.
  • Understand Agent-to-Agent (A2A) design patterns.
  • Write clean, production-grade Python code with comprehensive pytest unit tests.
  • Use Git for version control and GitLab CI/CD to automate build, test, and deployment pipelines.

Requirements:

Required Skills & Experience:

  • Hands-on experience in agentic AI system design and orchestration.
  • Strong prompt engineering skills for LLM control and output reliability.
  • Proven ability to build and maintain LangGraph workflows and reusable components.
  • Solid understanding of A2A orchestration principles.
  • Proficiency in Python, including writing pytest unit tests.
  • Practical experience with Git and GitLab CI/CD in a team environment.

Must have:

  • Strong prompt engineering skills for LLM control and output reliability.
  • Proven ability to build and maintain LangGraph workflows and reusable components.
  • Proficiency in Python, including writing pytest unit tests.
  • Use Git for version control and GitLab CI/CD to automate build, test, and deployment pipelines.

Good to have:

  • Hands-on experience in agentic AI system design and orchestration.
  • Solid understanding of A2A orchestration principles.

Must have:

  • Prompt engineering, LangGraph, Python, Git.

postedCompany.description:
KRIS INFOTECH PTE. LTD.

We partner with the IT industry providing comprehensive short and long-term technology & staffing solutions. We offer different options, to enable clients to optimize their human resources and at the same time reduce the risk and total cost of ownership. 

Under our Professional Services , we serve our client's manpower needs by providing smooth talent pipeline with flexible partnering options.

We have been very successful in reducing ownership costs and recruitment turnaround time for our clients.  

  • Our offerings are tailored around the identified domain, allowing us the ease to service our clients with domain experts.
  • We primary source talents from Singapore, Malaysia, Philippines, Thailand, Australia, Hong Kong and Japan
  • We have been supporting our clients regionally for business languages other than English viz. Mandarin, Thai, Japanese.

 

Our IT Professional Services include:

ü  Agency Contract

ü  Contingency Search

ü  Retained Search

 

Our Value-Added Services include:

-       Managed Payroll Services

-       Re-batching & Vendor Consolidation

-       Recruitment Process Outsourcing (RPO)

 

Our Focus: Technology Stack

  • ERP and CRM
  • Datawarehousing
  • Mobile and Web
  • Microsoft (.Net & Sharepoint)
  • Midrange (AS/400)
  • Infra (Networking, Sys Admin, DBAs, Storage, Telephony)
  • Subject Matter Expert, Project Managers and Business Analyst

 

Under our Technology Services brand – we specialize in IT Systems Integration encompassing the wide expanse of software, hardware and network technologies to enable businesses.

By combining best of breed solutions, cutting edge technologies and our proven processes, we aim to enhance your business productivity.

With time, we have invested in and collaborated with few specific Technology companies in the region to enhance our Technology Services.

We are very pleased bring to you the following FOUR service offerings:

 

ü  Big Data Consulting

ü  SAP Development Services

ü  Oracle E-Business Suite Services

ü  GRC Consulting
